subject: [PATCH v3] sched/fair: use rq_clock() in update_tg_load_avg() rate-limit

reviews.author: Peter Zijlstra
reviews.summary: The patch was merged into the tip tree without any objections or concerns raised by Peter Zijlstra.

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch replaces the rate-limiting mechanism in update_tg_load_avg() with rq_clock(), which is a more efficient and accurate way to measure time. The change reduces CPU usage by about 20% and eliminates the need for reading the TSC.
